description_long: This is a single-propeller, fixed-wing airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a conventional tail assembly. The wings are straight and mounted low on the fuselage, with no visible winglets or dihedral angles. The cockpit is positioned forward and appears to be enclosed, with a clear canopy and window frames visible. The landing gear is of the taildragger type, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel at the rear. The exterior is finished in a light, uniform color, and the propeller is mounted at the nose. The overall design suggests a classic, possibly vintage, light aircraft suitable for short-range flights.
description: A light, single-propeller airplane with low-mounted straight wings, a conventional tail, and a forward enclosed cockpit. The exterior is smooth and light-colored, with a taildragger landing gear configuration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose-mounted propeller, symmetrical low wings, and the forward canopy.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, cockpit canopy, and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizer, and the alignment of the main and tail wheels.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the propeller, cockpit, and tail structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy and window frames.
